evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about API pricing models
evals.prompt: How should I design pricing tiers for my REST API?

evals.description: Skill triggers when user asks about metered billing
evals.prompt: I want to charge customers per API call using Stripe. How do I set that up?

evals.description: Skill triggers on rate limiting questions
evals.prompt: What rate limiting strategy should I use for a paid API with multiple tiers?

evals.description: Agent can create a Stripe metered price
evals.prompt: Create a Stripe metered price for my API that charges $0.01 per API call billed monthly

evals.description: Agent can report usage records to Stripe correctly
evals.prompt: Write code to report 500 API calls to Stripe for a subscription item

evals.description: Agent can implement rate limiting middleware
evals.prompt: Write Express middleware for rate limiting with Redis that returns proper headers

evals.description: Agent can set up tiered pricing with graduated tiers in Stripe
evals.prompt: Set up graduated tiered pricing in Stripe: first 10k calls free, next 90k at $0.01, rest at $0.005

evals.description: Agent handles the overage notification pattern
evals.prompt: How do I notify customers when they are approaching their API quota limit?

evals.description: Agent warns against using action set for usage records
evals.prompt: Should I use action set or increment when reporting Stripe usage records?

evals.description: Agent warns about reporting usage too frequently to Stripe
evals.prompt: Should I report usage to Stripe on every single API request?

evals.description: Agent does not hallucinate a Stripe metering API that does not exist
evals.prompt: Use stripe.metering.report() to send usage data

evals.description: Agent does not invent a stripe.rateLimits API
evals.prompt: Use the Stripe rate limits API to set per-customer rate limits

evals.description: Agent correctly references the stripe-metering reference file
evals.prompt: I need detailed information about Stripe tiered pricing configuration with graduated tiers and test clocks
